summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Post-Eval Admin Dashboard tab feature. All backend tests passed (18/18). Frontend Post-Eval tab works correctly with all components visible: NPS Distribution chart, Readiness Level chart, Session Ratings, Facilitator cards (Dr. Celestine navy, Orimolade teal), Tool Comfort Ratings, Goals Achieved, One Thing Status, and Submissions table. Detail dialog opens correctly when clicking a row. Existing tabs (Overview, Full Report, Analysis, Submissions) are NOT broken. Pre-training assessment and post-evaluation pages still work.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic issue, charts still render correctly. This is a known Recharts issue when container dimensions are not immediately available.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Post-Eval tab fully functional with all components

seed_data_creation: Used existing 3 test post-evaluations seeded (test1@leadway.com, test2@leadway.com, test3@leadway.com)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Post-Eval admin dashboard tab fully tested. Backend endpoint GET /api/admin/post-eval-stats returns aggregated data including NPS (average, net_score, distribution), readiness_distribution, session_ratings, facilitator1_ratings, facilitator2_ratings, tool_averages, goals_achieved, one_thing_status, and submissions list. Frontend PostEvalTabContent component renders all charts and data correctly. Detail dialog (PostEvalDetail) opens when clicking a submission row and shows full evaluation data. Existing tabs and pages NOT broken.
